g.text: S(N, M) = w₁·R + w₂·C + w₃·E + w₄·Q
node relevance score · range 0.0 → 1.0 · threshold 0.15 to qualify

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the recency score calculated for a conversation node?')
sendPrompt('How is the connection score calculated and why does it have the highest weight?')
sendPrompt('How is entity overlap calculated between a node and the current message?')
sendPrompt('What is the open question score and when does a node score 1.0?')
sendPrompt('When does a node get a Q score of 1.0 for open questions?')
sendPrompt('How does the open question score work and why does it matter for retrieval?')
sendPrompt('What is the open question component Q(N) and when is it 1.0?')
sendPrompt('What does the Q open question score detect and how does it help?')

g.text: Edge type weights — used in C(N,M)
Recency decay — R(N) at different turn distances
Nodes scoring below 0.15 are excluded from injection — minimum signal threshold
